creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Sun Jul  7 16:47:36 2013
New Revision: 322453
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322453

Log:
  - update to 0.60
  - convert dependency on desktop-file-utils to USES
  
  PR:		179614
  Submitted by:	rm (myself)
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (3 weeks)

Modified:
  head/editors/zim/Makefile
  head/editors/zim/distinfo
  head/editors/zim/pkg-plist

Modified: head/editors/zim/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/editors/zim/Makefile	Sun Jul  7 16:45:24 2013	(r322452)
+++ head/editors/zim/Makefile	Sun Jul  7 16:47:36 2013	(r322453)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	zim
-PORTVERSION=	0.57
+PORTVERSION=	0.60
 CATEGORIES=	editors python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.zim-wiki.org/downloads/
 
@@ -16,8 +16,8 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}xdg>
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sqlite3>=0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-sqlite3
 
 INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
-USES=		gettext
-USE_GNOME=	desktopfileutils gtk20 pygtk2 pygobject
+USES=		gettext desktop-file-utils
+USE_GNOME=	gtk20 pygtk2 pygobject
 USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
